"'''Death, Dirt, and the Nerf Rancher's Daughter'''" is a free mini-adventure for any ''Star Wars'' era designed for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[Wizards of the Coast]]. It was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]].

The adventure was partly designed to promote the upcoming ''[[Alien Anthology]]'' supplement.

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|adventure}}
